title: Wire runbooks auto-diagnosis into integration-layer
summary: Added runbooks.diagnose() method to IntegrationLayer with fail-open error handling
description: Added runbooks instance to IntegrationLayer constructor and exposed diagnose() method that delegates to runbooks.diagnose(). Fail-open pattern: returns null if runbooks unavailable or throws. New test file with 3 test cases covering: (1) successful delegation to runbooks, (2) graceful null return when runbooks unavailable, (3) null return on runbooks error.

changes.diagnose_method: New method that delegates to runbooks.diagnose() with fail-open error handling

governance_impact: No breaking changes. Fail-open pattern maintains backward compatibility.
